privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic 8-week workout dataset (Jan 1 - Feb 26, 2024) containing exactly 48 data entries across 5 exercises (Squat, Bench Press, Barbell Row, Overhead Press, Deadlift). Weight progression follows standard strength training rules: +10 lbs for lower body (Squat, Deadlift) and +5 lbs for upper body (Bench Press, Overhead Press, Barbell Row). The 3x5 progression rule requires: (1) 3+ successful sessions at current weight, (2) activity within 14 days, (3) exclusion of DELOAD weeks (5 entries marked Feb 12-16). The data is 100% synthetic, generated in setup_task.sh with realistic inconsistencies (missed sessions, failed attempts, deload week, rep variations). Verifier checks for COUNTIFS formula presence, correct progression logic, accurate weight recommendations, conditional formatting, and absence of formula errors.
